name: What if I have no proof my AEO provider did bad work?
description: Use benchmarks/experts; weak without direct proof.[1][9]

mainEntity.name: What if I have no proof my AEO provider did bad work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use benchmarks/experts; weak without direct proof.[1][9]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Without direct evidence, claims weaken, but industry benchmarks and expert opinions can infer negligence.** Baseline visibility data helps.[9]

Burden on you to show substandard service.[1] Nationwide issue.

**Key factors:**
- Gather pre-contract AI tests.
- Competitor GEO results.[9]
- Provider reports.
- Witness statements.

Hire AEO expert witness early. Many cases fail sans proof; negotiate refund instead.
